reviews.review_description: This game is a scary good time. I'm not usually into horror games but I really like this one
I like the  game its so scary to play I love it its a great game this Game is so scary to play the guy on it is so scary I love the game

developer_response.body: Hello,  jenpratt1982 thank you for the review and raiting. The double doors behind you when you first enter the game are doors you "entered through" and are locked. Directly to your right is a single door which you can push open and walk through to start your search for the artifact. Hope this helps.
